scale_invariance_C2_hits.description: Part C2 PSLQ found 10 pairwise relations among Trans CF limits. After post-hoc inspection, all 10 reduce to the trivial scale invariance L(lambda*b1) = lambda*L(b1) for the (a0,a1,b0)=(0,0,0) sub-family. They are NOT phantom hits in the strict L-coefficient sense, and are NOT unexpected mathematically (linear scaling is structural for homogeneous recurrences). Logged for completeness only; no action required.
